summary.zh-CN: 本版本带来独立项目、项目文件引用、服务端目录选择器和更顺畅的运行时更新体验。
summary.en-US: This release adds independent projects, project file references, a server-side directory picker, and smoother runtime updates.

body.zh-CN: 项目即使还没有会话，也会保留在项目列表中；新建项目时可以选择空项目或知识库模板。
body.en-US: Projects remain visible before they have sessions, and new projects can start from empty or knowledge base templates.

body.zh-CN: 新建项目时可以浏览运行 NextClaw 服务的机器上的目录，并使用常用位置、搜索、新建文件夹和单击选择。
body.en-US: Project creation can browse directories on the service machine, with quick locations, search, new folders, and single-click selection.

body.zh-CN: 聊天输入框支持通过 @ 引用当前项目中的文件或目录，发送时会在项目边界内补充受限上下文。
body.en-US: The chat composer supports @ references for files and directories in the current project, adding bounded project context on send.

body.zh-CN: 项目视图能展示没有会话的项目，并从项目分组直接开启新任务。
body.en-US: Project view can show projects without sessions and start new tasks directly from project groups.

body.zh-CN: 运行时更新检查、下载和切换状态更连贯，完成更新后会自动切换到新的运行包。
body.en-US: Runtime update check, download, and switch states are more continuous, and completed updates switch to the new runtime bundle automatically.

title.zh-CN: 聊天输入与会话交互一致性

body.zh-CN: 中文输入法候选词、会话模型恢复、重试错误提示、技能选择和会话列表图标在多种状态下更稳定。
body.en-US: Chinese IME candidate input, session model restoration, retry error hints, skill selection, and session-list icons are steadier across states.

title.zh-CN: 更新完成后不再停在旧状态
title.en-US: Updates no longer stay on stale state

body.zh-CN: 更新流程不再因为页面状态停滞而让用户误以为仍停在旧版本。
body.en-US: The update flow no longer leaves the page looking stuck on the old version after the update has completed.

body.zh-CN: 本版本不需要手动迁移。
NPM 安装用户可以继续通过 stable 更新链路，或重新安装 nextclaw@latest 获取本版本。
body.en-US: NPM users can continue through the stable update path or reinstall nextclaw@latest to get this release.
